programs.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programs.desc: Amid the vibrant chaos of New Orleans' Mardi Gras celebrations, gunshots shatter the festive atmosphere of the French Quarter, leaving a man dead.

programs.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programs.desc: Early on Sunday morning, Detective Tanisha Sykes Smith responds to a man found deceased from multiple gunshot wounds alongside a building in the Lower 9th Ward.

programs.title: My Strange Arrest:2
programs.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more.

programs.title: My Strange Arrest:2
programs.sub_title: Can I Show You My Butt
programs.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a senior citizen wields an unusual weapon—her mouth; a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive-thru; and more.

programs.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome:2
programs.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programs.title: Booked: First Day In:1
programs.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.
